title: Shooting at Garden Route Mall
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Herald is on the scene...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GEORGE NEWS - George Herald is on the scene where a man was shot and killed in the parking area at the Garden Route Mall earlier this morning, Sunday 3 November.

No arrests have been made yet.


> More information will follow as soon as we receive confirmed feedback from relevant authorities.


Emergency services and police are on the scene.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
